metadata.title: Social Security Payment Schedule 2026 | Dates by Birthday
metadata.description: See how the 2026 Social Security payment schedule works by birthday range, SSI, and pre-May-1997 rules. Use the date checker for your month.

hero.title: Social Security Payment Schedule 2026
hero.description: Most Social Security payments in 2026 follow the second, third, or fourth Wednesday rule based on birthday range. SSI and older benefit cases use different scheduled dates.
hero.tip: Independent tool. Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Social Security Administration.

checker.title: Check a 2026 Social Security payment date
checker.description: Choose your benefit type, birthday range, and payment month to estimate the scheduled payment date.

rules.title: 2026 payment rules at a glance
rules.description: The public SSA schedule separates most Social Security payments by birthday range. SSI and pre-May-1997 cases are handled separately.

items.title: Second Wednesday
items.description: For most Social Security recipients with birthdays from the 1st through the 10th.

items.title: Third Wednesday
items.description: For most Social Security recipients with birthdays from the 11th through the 20th.

items.title: Fourth Wednesday
items.description: For most Social Security recipients with birthdays from the 21st through the 31st.

items.title: 1st or 3rd rules
items.description: SSI is generally paid on the 1st. Social Security before May 1997, or Social Security plus SSI, generally uses the 3rd.

items.question: Does everyone get paid on the same date?
items.answer: No. Most Social Security payment dates depend on birthday range, while SSI and pre-May-1997 cases follow separate rules.

items.question: What happens when a payment date is a federal holiday?
items.answer: SSA schedules payments earlier when a normal payment date falls on a weekend or federal legal holiday.

items.question: Can this site confirm that SSA issued my payment?
items.answer: No. The checker estimates scheduled dates only. It cannot see SSA records, bank posting status, or Direct Express activity.

cta.title: Find your 2026 payment date
cta.description: Use the checker with your benefit type, birthday range, and month.
